tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose regulation or possible prediabetes. Creatinine is also elevated, suggesting reduced kidney function. Other parameters, including glucose, electrolytes, and urea nitrogen, are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and glycemic control, and clinical correlation for possible early diabetic nephropathy.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
